data.title: Black Diamond Group declares CAD 0.035 dividend
data.description:
• Black Diamond Group (TSX:BDI:CA) declared CAD 0.035/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Payable April 15; for shareholders of record March 31; ex-div March 31.
  • See BDI:CA Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: aTyr rises after safety update on lead program
data.description:
• aTyr Pharma (NASDAQ:ATYR) traded higher in the premarket on Friday after the company said that an expert panel tasked with evaluating safety data in its lead program, EFZO-FIT, recommended that the trial be continued without any modifications.
  • The decision was based on EFZO-FIT’s fourth, pre-planned interim safety analysis by the trial’s independent data and safety monitoring board, the San Diego, California-headquartered biotech added.
  • The 52-week Phase 3 study is designed to evaluate aTyr’s (NASDAQ:ATYR) lead candidate efzofitimod in pulmonary sarcoidosis, a condition characterized by lumps or nodules in the lungs.
  • “The positive outcome from this fourth DSMB review for EFZO-FIT™ further reinforces our confidence in the favorable safety profile that we have seen for efzofitimod to date,” CEO Sanjay Shukla noted. The company remains on track to report topline data from the study in Q3 2025.

data.title: Land's End initiates process to explore strategic alternatives
data.description:
• Lands' End (NASDAQ:LE) has announced that its Board of Directors has initiated a process to explore strategic alternatives, including a sale, merger or similar transaction involving the Co., to maximize shareholder value.
  • “While we remain confident in the Co.’s potential for future value creation, the Board also believes that the market is undervaluing this great Co. and its upside potential.” said Josephine Linden, Chair of the Board.
  • "As a result, in consultation with the Board’s legal and financial advisors, we have determined it is an appropriate time to explore strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value." Linden continued.
  • No assurances can be given as to the outcome or timing of the Board’s process.

data.title: Gannett announces additional debt reduction
data.description:
• Gannett (NYSE:GCI) said on Friday that it has prepaid approximately $57.5M on its five-year first lien term loan facility.
  • As a result of this prepayment, the company has reduced its first lien debt from $850M to $792.5M during the first quarter of 2025.
  • The debt repayment was funded with the proceeds from the sale of the Austin-American Statesmen that was completed on February 28, 2025, as well as cash on hand.

data.title: DeFi Technologies acquires majority stake in Swiss AI and asset management firm Neuronomics AG
data.description:
• DeFi Technologies (OTCQB:DEFTF) said on Friday that it has increased its stake in Neuronomics AG, a Swiss asset management firm specializing in artificial intelligence and model-driven quantitative trading strategies, to 52.5%.
  • This acquisition follows DeFi Technologies' earlier subscription to a capital increase in Neuronomics, where the company acquired a 10% stake.
  • In connection with the acquisition, the company issued 186,304 common shares of the company, plus additional cash considerations, to the selling shareholders of Neuronomics.

data.title: Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust renews normal course issuer bid
data.description:
• Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust (PMZ.UN:CA) said it has received approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange to renew its normal course issuer bid.
  • Under the bid, the firm may purchase for cancellation up to a maximum of 7.57M of its Series A units.
  • The bid will start on March 11 and remain in effect until the earlier of March 10, 2026.

data.title: Zscaler gets upgrade at BofA after "healthy" quarterly results
data.description:
BofA upgraded Zscaler's (NASDAQ:ZS) rating to Buy from Neutral noting that the cloud security provider's fiscal second-quarter was "healthy" with improvement in upsell capabilities.

The firm raised the price target on the stock to $240 from $215.

On Wednesday, Zscaler raised its fiscal year outlook and the company's second-quarter results beat estimates, which saw largely bullish views from Wall Street analysts.

BofA said Zscaler had strong results with billings/revenue up 18%/23% year-over-year, above Street’s estimate of 15%/21%, driven by strong upsell and larger deal sizes.

The analysts noted that key positives include a strengthening portfolio, especially on zero-trust and data initiatives, and a ramp in sales productivity, following last year's changes.

The analysts added that, as the company is showing good signs of successful diversification, solid order growth and improvement in upsell capabilities, they upgraded the stock to Buy from Neutral and increased their price target.

Shares of Zscaler rose about 1% premarket on Friday.

data.title: MDA Space Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.28, revenue of C$346.6M; initiates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• MDA Space press release (OTCPK:MDALF): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.28.
  • Revenue of C$346.6M.
  • Backlog of C$4.4 billion at quarter-end, up 42% Y/Y.
  • Adjusted EBITDA of C$71 million, up 68% Y/Y; adjusted EBITDA margin of 20.5%.
  • Introduction of 2025 Financial Outlook
    • Revenues expected to be C$1.50 - C$1.65 billion, representing ~ 45% Y/Y growth.
    • Adjusted EBITDA expected to be C$290 - C$320 million, representing ~ 40% Y/Y growth, with adjusted EBITDA margin of 19%-20%.

data.title: Ensign Energy Services GAAP EPS of -C$0.11, revenue of C$426.52M; initiates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Ensign Energy Services press release (OTCPK:ESVIF): Q4 GAAP EPS of -C$0.11.
  • Revenue of C$426.52M (-0.9% Y/Y).
  • Adjusted EBITDA for 2024 was C$450.1 million, an eight percent decrease from Adjusted EBITDA of C$490.2 million for 2023.
  • Funds flow from operations for 2024 decreased six percent to C$436.2 million from C$464.9 million in the prior year.
  • The Company has budgeted maintenance capital expenditures for 2025 of approximately C$164.0 million and selective growth and customer funded capital of C$8.0 million. The Company may continue to consider rig relocation, upgrade, or growth projects in response to customer demand and under appropriate contract terms.
